description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:16.13 Docker image and a global before_script that runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install. Define stages test and build, and include the Security/Dependency-Scanning.gitlab-ci.yml template. Add a build job in the build stage that executes yarn and then yarn build, caches node_modules/ and .yarn with a key based on $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-$CI_PROJECT_DIR and policy pull, also defines a top‑level cache with key $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME for node_modules/ and build/, marked untracked, and stores the build/ directory as an artifact. The pipeline has no explicit rules, so jobs run on all branches.
